title: Write API test coverage for critical paths
description:
Write integration tests for the API's critical CRUD paths using Vitest. Cover:
- Auth: login, token validation, rejection of invalid tokens
- Tasks: create, read, update, delete, assign/unassign
- Calendar: create event, recurring event expansion, timezone handling
- Shopping: create list, add items, check/uncheck, price recording

Focus on regression prevention — each test should catch a break in the API contract.

Acceptance criteria:
- Auth module has 5+ tests covering happy path and error cases
- Each feature module has CRUD tests
- Tests run in CI (GitHub Actions)

Dev Lead.notes: Sarah Kim approved. See review for details.
